seed varies from person to person. The interval between the
fecundation and the sex act cannot be known precisely. It can
be seconds or minutes.
Adhana lagna (moment of conception and Birth lagna are
inter-related. Adhana literally means 'putting in or placing
in'. Phala Dipika uses the word to mean impregnation.
Nisheka means the same as Adhana. This lagna is related to
the birth Lagna. Further investigations on these are those by
E.H. Bailey, and F.C.Dutt. Bailey worked in close collabora
tion with Sepharial and published his Pre-Natal Epoch, and
Astrology and Birth Control.

Pre-Natal Epoch 83
The main ideas of these writers are worth noting.
(i) Moon at birth is equidistant from the lagna at birth and
coitus. Moon is at the mid point of both the lagna.
(ii) The Lagna at Coitus is as much removed from the Moon
at birth as the Moon is from Birth lagna.
(iii) 'The lagna at Coitus may be the midpoint of the lagna
